title: Server join crash and updater guard
summary: Keeps the Sodium native crash guard and prevents automatic updates from rolling back to older bundles.
changes: Forces LWJGL allocator=system during Fabric preLaunch to avoid the Sodium GLDrawBatch jemalloc native crash on server join.
Prevents the updater from applying an older manifest over a newer installed jar.
Keeps the JourneyMap crash guard from 1.17.177.
Removes the risk of a stale pending update downgrading the local install.
